title: Test build of gateway and puck apps with t_deck_esp32s3_procpu.conf in worker17 worktree
description: After syncing configs, run west build for lichen/apps/gateway and lichen/apps/puck with the T-Deck board in the worker17 worktree. Verify no Kconfig warnings or conflicts. Use appropriate -b esp32s3_devkitm or t_deck equivalent.
